title: agrostis blasdalei
intro: Agrostis blasdalei, also known as Blasdale's bentgrass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agrostis blasdalei include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat minor skin issues and promote overall well-being.
